policy.notes: Entries expire on expires_on (UTC). Empty allowlist means every finding fails when enforcement is on. Prefer upgrading deps over allowlisting.

entries.rationale: No fixed PyPI release beyond 1.5.9 (last_affected). Archium uses chromadb.PersistentClient on a local path only (archium/infrastructure/vector/chroma_store.py); it does not expose the Chroma FastAPI HTTP collection endpoint that CVE-2026-45829 targets. Revisit when upstream ships a patched release.
